name: data translation: a profile without data answers emits no data or distributed concerns
command:
cat > p3.json <<'JEOF'
{"complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"shop","criticality":"important","availability_tolerance":"hours","data_loss_tolerance":"hours","data_sensitivity":"internal","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"medium","budget_posture":"cost-first"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile p3.json --out tr.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tr.json","utf8"));const flat=Object.values(j.pillars).flat();process.exit(!j.pillars.data&&!j.pillars.integration&&!j.pillars.distributed?0:1)' && echo no-data 1>&2
